evals.expected_output: A standalone self-contained HTML learning artifact, most likely a bilingual digest for this general article, with source metadata and a structured summary layout.

The HTML includes a source link back to the original URL

evals.prompt: 请把这份课程阅读整理成中文学习资料 HTML，按原文章节输出，每章先给原文摘要，再整理重点、术语和复习提示。File: /Users/siyu/Works/github.com/siyuqian/agent-skills/skills/article-digest/evals/test-files/sample.pdf
evals.expected_output: A standalone self-contained Chinese-first study-guide HTML file with source metadata, a table of contents or visible section hierarchy, chapter-by-chapter learning content, and explicit 原文摘要 blocks for the major sections of the source.
expectations: Output includes at least one .html file
The HTML file is self-contained with no external CSS or JS dependencies
The HTML contains a Chinese-first study-guide layout rather than only a flat digest
The HTML contains visible source metadata
The HTML contains at least one 原文摘要 or Source Summary block tied to a source section
